description: Capabilities for the Centinelo Phone main window - custom titlebar controls + tray-driven show/hide + the auto-updater's read-only check (updater:allow-check) and its post-install relaunch (process:allow-restart). Download/install are this app's OWN commands (src/updater.rs), not plugin commands, so they need no ACL entry here - see shell/README.md "Auto-updater" for why (2026-07-17 4R re-review: the plugin's own plugin:updater|install has no way to gate itself on an active call, so this app never grants it at all - only allow-check, the read-only half, stays a plugin permission).
